dataSources.name: Midnight Census NEW

relations.sql:
SELECT
		ADT_MASTER.DEPARTMENT_KEY as "DEPARTMENT_KEY"
	,	ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ENCOUNTER_EPIC_CSN as "Encounter CSN"
	,	CASE
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'BLUE RIDGE HOSPITAL' THEN 'Blue Ridge'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'CALDWELL HOSPITAL' THEN 'Caldwell'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'Charles A Cannon Jr Memorial Hospital' THEN 'Cannon'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'CHATHAM HOSPITAL' THEN 'Chatham'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'JOHNSTON HOSPITAL' THEN 'Johnston'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'Lenoir Memorial Hospital' THEN 'Lenoir'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'NASH HOSPITAL' THEN 'Nash'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'PARDEE HOSPITAL' THEN 'Pardee'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'REX HOSPITAL' THEN 'Rex'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'SOUTHEASTERN REGIONAL HOSPITAL' THEN 'Southeastern'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'UNC HOSPITALS' THEN 'Med Center'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'UNC ROCKINGHAM HOSPITAL' THEN 'Rockingham'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'Watauga Medical Center' THEN 'Watauga'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'Wayne Memorial Hospital' THEN 'Wayne'
		END AS "Parent Hospital"
	,	LOCATION_MASTER.LOCATION_NAME AS "Hospital"
	,	LOCATION_MASTER.DEPARTMENT_NAME as "Unit"
	,	ADT_MASTER.ADT_PATIENT_CLASS as "Patient Class"
	,	CAST(ADT_MASTER.ADT_EFFECTIVE_INSTANT as DATE) as "Census Date"
	,	1 as "Census Count"
	, 	CASE WHEN getyear(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT)-getyear(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)
					- case 
						when getmonth(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) << getmonth(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)
							OR (getmonth(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) = getmonth(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE) AND getday(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) << getday(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)) 
						then 1
						else 0
					  end >>= 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as "Census Count Adults"
	, 	CASE WHEN getyear(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT)-getyear(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)
					- case 
						when getmonth(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) << getmonth(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)
							OR (getmonth(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) = getmonth(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE) AND getday(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) << getday(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)) 
						then 1
						else 0
					  end << 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as "Census Count Peds"
FROM 
		"REPORTING_EHR".ADMISSION_DISCHARGE_TRANSFER_MASTER ADT_MASTER
		LEFT JOIN "REPORTING_EHR".LOCATION_MASTER LOCATION_MASTER ON ADT_MASTER.DEPARTMENT_KEY = LOCATION_MASTER.LOCATION_KEY 
			AND LOCATION_MASTER.IS_DEPARTMENT = 1
		LEFT JOIN "REPORTING_EHR".ENCOUNTER_MASTER ENCOUNTER_MASTER ON ADT_MASTER.ENCOUNTER_KEY = ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ENCOUNTER_KEY
		LEFT JOIN "REPORTING_EHR".PATIENT_MASTER PATIENT_MASTER ON ENCOUNTER_MASTER.PATIENT_KEY = PATIENT_MASTER.PATIENT_KEY
WHERE 1=1
		AND PATIENT_MASTER.IS_TEST = 0
		AND LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME IN (
																'BLUE RIDGE HOSPITAL'
															,	'CALDWELL HOSPITAL'
															,	'Charles A Cannon Jr Memorial Hospital'
															,	'CHATHAM HOSPITAL'
															,	'JOHNSTON HOSPITAL'
															,	'Lenoir Memorial Hospital'
															,	'NASH HOSPITAL'
															,	'PARDEE HOSPITAL'
															,	'REX HOSPITAL'
															,	'SOUTHEASTERN REGIONAL HOSPITAL'
															,	'UNC HOSPITALS'
															,	'UNC ROCKINGHAM HOSPITAL'
															,	'Watauga Medical Center'
															,	'Wayne Memorial Hospital'
															)
		AND ADT_MASTER.EVENT_TYPE = 'Census'
		AND ADT_MASTER.EVENT_SUB_TYPE <<>> 'Canceled'
		AND ADT_MASTER.DEPARTMENT_KEY IS NOT NULL
		AND ADT_MASTER.ADT_EFFECTIVE_INSTANT >>= '2020-01-01 00:00:00.000'

dataSources.customSql:
SELECT
		ADT_MASTER.DEPARTMENT_KEY as "DEPARTMENT_KEY"
	,	ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ENCOUNTER_EPIC_CSN as "Encounter CSN"
	,	CASE
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'BLUE RIDGE HOSPITAL' THEN 'Blue Ridge'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'CALDWELL HOSPITAL' THEN 'Caldwell'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'Charles A Cannon Jr Memorial Hospital' THEN 'Cannon'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'CHATHAM HOSPITAL' THEN 'Chatham'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'JOHNSTON HOSPITAL' THEN 'Johnston'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'Lenoir Memorial Hospital' THEN 'Lenoir'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'NASH HOSPITAL' THEN 'Nash'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'PARDEE HOSPITAL' THEN 'Pardee'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'REX HOSPITAL' THEN 'Rex'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'SOUTHEASTERN REGIONAL HOSPITAL' THEN 'Southeastern'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'UNC HOSPITALS' THEN 'Med Center'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'UNC ROCKINGHAM HOSPITAL' THEN 'Rockingham'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'Watauga Medical Center' THEN 'Watauga'
			 WHEN LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME = 'Wayne Memorial Hospital' THEN 'Wayne'
		END AS "Parent Hospital"
	,	LOCATION_MASTER.LOCATION_NAME AS "Hospital"
	,	LOCATION_MASTER.DEPARTMENT_NAME as "Unit"
	,	ADT_MASTER.ADT_PATIENT_CLASS as "Patient Class"
	,	CAST(ADT_MASTER.ADT_EFFECTIVE_INSTANT as DATE) as "Census Date"
	,	1 as "Census Count"
	, 	CASE WHEN getyear(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT)-getyear(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)
					- case 
						when getmonth(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) << getmonth(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)
							OR (getmonth(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) = getmonth(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE) AND getday(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) << getday(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)) 
						then 1
						else 0
					  end >>= 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as "Census Count Adults"
	, 	CASE WHEN getyear(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT)-getyear(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)
					- case 
						when getmonth(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) << getmonth(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)
							OR (getmonth(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) = getmonth(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE) AND getday(ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ADMISSION_INSTANT) << getday(PATIENT_MASTER.BIRTH_DATE)) 
						then 1
						else 0
					  end << 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as "Census Count Peds"
FROM 
		"REPORTING_EHR".ADMISSION_DISCHARGE_TRANSFER_MASTER ADT_MASTER
		LEFT JOIN "REPORTING_EHR".LOCATION_MASTER LOCATION_MASTER ON ADT_MASTER.DEPARTMENT_KEY = LOCATION_MASTER.LOCATION_KEY 
			AND LOCATION_MASTER.IS_DEPARTMENT = 1
		LEFT JOIN "REPORTING_EHR".ENCOUNTER_MASTER ENCOUNTER_MASTER ON ADT_MASTER.ENCOUNTER_KEY = ENCOUNTER_MASTER.ENCOUNTER_KEY
		LEFT JOIN "REPORTING_EHR".PATIENT_MASTER PATIENT_MASTER ON ENCOUNTER_MASTER.PATIENT_KEY = PATIENT_MASTER.PATIENT_KEY
WHERE 1=1
		AND PATIENT_MASTER.IS_TEST = 0
		AND LOCATION_MASTER.PARENT_REVENUE_LOCATION_NAME IN (
																'BLUE RIDGE HOSPITAL'
															,	'CALDWELL HOSPITAL'
															,	'Charles A Cannon Jr Memorial Hospital'
															,	'CHATHAM HOSPITAL'
															,	'JOHNSTON HOSPITAL'
															,	'Lenoir Memorial Hospital'
															,	'NASH HOSPITAL'
															,	'PARDEE HOSPITAL'
															,	'REX HOSPITAL'
															,	'SOUTHEASTERN REGIONAL HOSPITAL'
															,	'UNC HOSPITALS'
															,	'UNC ROCKINGHAM HOSPITAL'
															,	'Watauga Medical Center'
															,	'Wayne Memorial Hospital'
															)
		AND ADT_MASTER.EVENT_TYPE = 'Census'
		AND ADT_MASTER.EVENT_SUB_TYPE <<>> 'Canceled'
		AND ADT_MASTER.DEPARTMENT_KEY IS NOT NULL
		AND ADT_MASTER.ADT_EFFECTIVE_INSTANT >>= '2020-01-01 00:00:00.000'

calculatedFields.caption: User Defined Census Count
calculatedFields.formula:
CASE [Filter Adults/Peds]
    WHEN '(All)' THEN SUM([Census Count])
    WHEN 'Adults' THEN SUM([Census Count Adults])
    WHEN 'Peds' THEN SUM([Census Count Peds])
END

calculatedFields.caption: Start Month Contains Partial Data?
calculatedFields.formula:
IF
YEAR(MAX([Census Date])) = YEAR(MAX([Start Date]))
AND MONTH(MAX([Census Date])) = MONTH(MAX([Start Date]))
AND MIN([Start Date]) <> DATE(STR(YEAR(WINDOW_MIN(MIN([Census Date]))))+'-'+STR(MONTH(WINDOW_MIN(MIN([Census Date]))))+'-01')
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

calculatedFields.caption: End Month Contains Partial Data?
calculatedFields.formula:
IF MONTH(MAX([End Date])) = 12 THEN
    IF YEAR(MAX([Census Date])) = YEAR(MAX([End Date]))
    AND MONTH(MAX([Census Date])) = MONTH(MAX([End Date]))
    AND MAX([End Date]) <> DATEADD('day', -1, DATE(STR(YEAR(WINDOW_MAX(MAX([Census Date])))+1)+'-'+STR(MONTH(DATEADD('month', 1, WINDOW_MAX(MAX([Census Date])))))+'-01'))
    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
ELSEIF YEAR(MAX([Census Date])) = YEAR(MAX([End Date]))
    AND MONTH(MAX([Census Date])) = MONTH(MAX([End Date]))
    AND MAX([End Date]) <> DATEADD('day', -1, DATE(STR(YEAR(WINDOW_MAX(MAX([Census Date]))))+'-'+STR(MONTH(DATEADD('month', 1, WINDOW_MAX(MAX([Census Date])))))+'-01'))
    THEN 1 ELSE 0 
END

calculatedFields.caption: Default Start Date
calculatedFields.formula:
IF MONTH(TODAY()) >= 7 OR MONTH(TODAY()) <= 9 
THEN DATE(STR(YEAR(TODAY())) + '-01-01')
ELSE
    IF MONTH(TODAY()) < 7 THEN
        DATE(STR(YEAR(TODAY())-1) + '-07-01')
    ELSE DATE(STR(YEAR(TODAY())) + '-07-01')
    END
END

calculatedFields.caption: Date agg_Monthly
calculatedFields.formula:
CASE [Date Agg Level]
    WHEN 'Monthly' THEN 'Include'
    ELSE 'Exclude'
END

calculatedFields.caption: Partial Months in View?
calculatedFields.formula:
IF DAY([Start Date]) != 1
    OR DAY(DATEADD('day',1,[End Date])) != 1
THEN "**Partial months are displayed in GRAY**" ELSE "" END

calculatedFields.caption: View_BarChart
calculatedFields.formula:
CASE [View]
    WHEN 'Bar Chart' THEN 'Include'
    ELSE 'Exclude' 
END

calculatedFields.caption: Date agg_Daily
calculatedFields.formula:
CASE [Date Agg Level]
    WHEN 'Daily' THEN 'Include'
    ELSE 'Exclude'
END

calculatedFields.caption: View_DataTable
calculatedFields.formula:
CASE [View]
    WHEN 'Data Table' THEN 'Include'
    ELSE 'Exclude' 
END

worksheets.name: Filters Applied Caption
worksheets.caption: Filter(s) Applied: Date Range: {Start Date}-{End Date}; Parent Hospital(s): {Parent Hospital}; Hospital(s): {Hospital}; Unit(s): {Unit}; Patient Class: {Patient Class}; Filter Adults/Peds: {Filter Adults/Peds}

worksheets.name: Last Refresh Date

zones.text: This dashboard provides information on Patient Days, calculated by Midnight Census. Filters applied will apply to all other tabs.
Midnight Census is based on ADT (Admission, Discharge, Transfer) Census events not marked Canceled.  Test patients are excluded.
The data source is based on freehand SQL and relies on ADT (Admission, Discharge, Transfer) data available via the Carolina Data Warehouse for Health (CDW-H).

Austin Gilmore
Dashboard Creator, BI Analyst
austin.gilmore@unchealth.unc.edu
